issues.sample: The contact owns a 2023 Jeep Wrangler 4XE. The contact stated while driving at various speeds, the battery failed to maintain the charge. The contact sustained minor cuts due to an interior metal chrome lining that had deteriorated. No medical attention was sought. The local deal

While driving to work before daylight the jeep lost all electrical power and cut all lights inside and outside so I couldn't see.  There were no other lights to guide me to a pull off.  I almost hit a concrete barrier because of this.  I just got this vehicle back from replacing

narrative.headline: What 2023 Jeep Wrangler 4xe owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
